name: Westborough

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

majorFacilities.name: Whittier Rehabilitation Hospital Westborough
majorFacilities.type: acute rehabilitation hospital with long-term acute care unit

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: specialty hospitals and large multi-specialty medical office buildings
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: Westborough State Hospital is closed and is deliberately not referenced. The two operating hospitals are Whittier (rehabilitation and long-term acute care) and Westborough Behavioral.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
